records.ety: [OE. agremoyne, OF. aigremoine, L. agrimonia for argemonia, fr. Gr. <?/.]

defs: A genus of plants of the Rose family.
The name is also given to various other plants; as, hemp agrimony (Eupatorium cannabinum); water agrimony (Bidens).
notes: ☞ The Agrimonia eupatoria, or common agrimony, a perennial herb with a spike of yellow flowers, was once esteemed as a medical remedy, but is now seldom used.
